rationale: The Iran deal narrative driving global market surges offers mild indirect relief on energy costs for Portugal, while elevated Iberian wildfire/drought risk continues as the dominant seasonal concern.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near; markets surge
top_events.summary: Global markets surged on Iran deal optimism; for Portugal this means modest relief on energy import costs and tourism-linked economic confidence, though unconfirmed structurally.

top_events.title: Wildfire / climate risk in Iberia
top_events.summary: No new wildfire incident this cycle but elevated seasonal risk persists under El Niño conditions; background concern for Portuguese residents.

top_events.title: Powerful earthquake in southern Philippines
top_events.summary: 37 dead; geographically distant, no direct relevance to Portugal.
